publish_first.title: Chimpanzees have a secret language of butts
This black bird’s ear tufts aren’t ears at all 🦉

remake_first.source_title: Ducklings know math before they can swim 🦆
remake_first.action: remake the proven topic with a new first sentence and tighter visual promise
instructions: Keep the winning subject promise, but change the first sentence.
Use a different animal or a visibly different angle when possible.
Try another narrative template and narrator variant.
Do not reuse the same source clip.
candidate_titles: Ducklings know math before they can swim 🦆 - the part viewers missed
Ducklings know math before they can swim 🦆 explained in one detail
Why Ducklings know math before they can swim 🦆 works

fixes: Add an action verb such as remember, escape, heal, use, or choose.
Let the hook advance the title instead of repeating it.
Add one visual detail and one because/payoff sentence.
Add a simple because/that-is-why payoff.
retention_surgery.suggested_hook: Ducklings do this for one hidden reason.

rewrite_instructions: Open with the animal plus outcome in the first two seconds.
Remove setup; explain only the mechanism viewers can see or imagine.
Keep the remake shorter than the original if retention was below 60%.
Change the thumbnail promise, not just the wording.

orders: Publish agency publish_now candidates before generic queue items.

Rewrite low retention hooks before creating more similar videos.
